overview.label: Overview
overview.description: See sites, databases, containers, and server health in one place.

hosts.label: Hosts
hosts.description: Review enrolled agents, host status, and declared capabilities.

tasks.label: Tasks
tasks.description: Track task plans, execution steps, and results.

approvals.label: Approvals
approvals.description: Handle high-risk host actions and AI plan approvals.

apps.label: Virtual machines
apps.description: Manage VM lifecycle, images, hosts, and resource allocation.

ai.label: AI
ai.description: Manage agent runtime environments and task capabilities.

terminal.label: Terminal
terminal.description: Choose an agent and run audited terminal commands.

websites.label: Websites
websites.description: Inspect websites, domains, certificates, and service health.

databases.label: Databases
databases.description: Manage database instances, backups, and connection state.

containers.label: Containers
containers.description: Manage container lifecycle, images, and resource usage.

system.label: System
system.description: Inspect host resources, disks, network, and security state.

logs.label: Logs
logs.description: Review control-plane, agent, and task logs in one place.

cron.description: Review backup, inspection, and automation jobs.

settings.label: Panel settings
settings.description: Configure theme, security entrypoints, sessions, and API access.
